title: Project Setup and Data Models
description: Initialize project with TypeScript, Vitest, Commander.js. Define all data contracts in src/pipeline/types.ts and setup CLI commands.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN `npm run build` runs THEN it compiles successfully; WHEN `npx tsx src/cli.ts --help` runs THEN it shows run, atomize, hypergraph, requirements, infer, review commands; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-design.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify types.ts matches design spec exactly.

title: Stage 1: Atomizer
description: Implement SOP parsing rules (A1-F5), action dictionary matching, and prompt-based LLM extraction to convert raw SOP text into OpTable.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN Atomizer runs on sample SOP THEN it outputs a valid OpTable JSON; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-design.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify rules engine splits sentences correctly.
review_regression_requirements: Verify unit tests for Atomizer pass.
notes: picked_reason:P0 first executable pipeline stage; unlocks downstream hypergraph and requirements issues; done_at:2026-06-09; skills_used:test-driven-development; mcp_used:none-required; tdd_red:npm test -- tests/atomizer.test.ts failed on missing behavior after skeletal module; review_initial:rules split consecutive/composite SOP actions and standardize verbs via atomizer tests; review_regression:npm test exit0 2 files 5 tests; npm run build exit0; CLI atomize sample generated 4 ops with 转移,离心,弃液,收集; graphify_update:graphify update . exit0

title: Stage 2: Hypergraph Builder
description: Implement node extraction, synonym normalization, node reuse, and hyperedge assembly.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN Hypergraph Builder runs on OpTable THEN it outputs valid nodes.json and hyperedges.json with correct references; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-design.md
review_regression_requirements: Verify unit tests for Hypergraph Builder pass.
notes: picked_reason:P0 downstream dependency for deterministic requirement generation; done_at:2026-06-09; skills_used:test-driven-development; mcp_used:none-required; tdd_red:npm test -- tests/hypergraph.test.ts failed on normalization/node assembly assertions after skeletal module; review_initial:normalizeNodeName maps 磷酸盐缓冲液 to PBS and buildHypergraph reuses one Input node across OP-001/OP-002; review_regression:npm test exit0 3 files 7 tests; npm run build exit0; CLI atomize+hypergraph generated 41 nodes and H-OP-001..H-OP-004 with connected nodes; graphify_update:graphify update . exit0

title: Stage 3: Requirement Generator
description: Implement deterministic mapping rules (R1-R10) and domain pattern matching. Add fingerprinting for deduplication.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN Generator runs on Hypergraph THEN it outputs requirements.json with correct direct mappings and no duplicates; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-design.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify direct mapping and fingerprint deduplication.
review_regression_requirements: Verify unit tests for Requirement Generator pass.

title: Stage 4: LLM Inference
description: Implement LLM client with retry/fallback. Add prompts for Candidate Generation, Rewriting, and Semantic Dedup.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN LLM Inference runs THEN it generates implicit requirements with source_hyperedge references; WHEN LLM fails THEN it degrades gracefully; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-design.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify LLM error handling and schema validation.
review_regression_requirements: Verify unit tests for LLM client pass.

title: Stage 5: Reviewer & Mermaid Visualizations
description: Implement coverage matrix generation, requirement verification rules, interactive CLI review mode, and 5 Mermaid diagram renderers.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN Reviewer runs THEN coverage.json and report.md with embedded .mmd diagrams are generated; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-design.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify mermaid syntax is valid and coverage matrix calculates correctly.
review_regression_requirements: Verify output generation unit tests pass.

title: E2E Tests and CLI Integration
description: Wire up pipeline runner, test end-to-end flow with sample SOP fixture, verify full CLI execution.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN `autobio run sample-sop.md` executes THEN it completes all 5 stages and outputs the final folder structure; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-design.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify full pipeline execution works seamlessly.
review_regression_requirements: Verify all E2E and integration tests pass.

title: Review task outcome against original request
description: Audit the entire codebase and CLI functionality against the design spec and AutoBiology methodology.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN review is complete THEN confirm that the CLI successfully parses SOPs to hypergraphs and extracts R1-R10 requirements; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-09-autobiocli-design.md
review_initial_requirements: Verify codebase matches design spec architecture.
